cmd/jobs.purpose: Cobra CLI binary grouping administrative one-off jobs (billing advance/collect, entitlement recalculation, ledger backfill, LLM cost sync, DB migration, quickstart cron). Each sub-command lives in its own sub-package under cmd/jobs/; shared wiring is in cmd/jobs/internal.

patterns.name: PersistentPreRunE initialises the app once
patterns.description: main.go's rootCmd.PersistentPreRunE calls internal.InitializeApplication(ctx, configFileName) before every sub-command executes. Sub-commands must never initialise services themselves.
patterns.example: PersistentPreRunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error { return internal.InitializeApplication(ctx, configFileName) }

patterns.name: internal.App as the single service registry
patterns.description: All sub-commands access domain services exclusively via package-level globals internal.App and internal.Config — never by constructing services inline.

patterns.name: cmd.Context() for context propagation
patterns.description: Every RunE uses cmd.Context() (derived from the signal-aware root context) rather than context.Background() or context.TODO().
patterns.example: RunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error { return doWork(cmd.Context()) }

patterns.name: Sub-command registered in sub-package init() or RootCommand()
patterns.description: Each sub-package exports either a package-level Cmd var (registered in init()) or a RootCommand() factory. main.go adds them with rootCmd.AddCommand(...).

patterns.name: Nil-guard optional app services before use
patterns.description: Optional features (e.g. ChargesAutoAdvancer) may be nil when the feature is disabled. Always nil-check before calling.

patterns.name: Deferred AppShutdown in main
patterns.description: main.go defers internal.AppShutdown() to release resources regardless of execution path, including early-exit error paths.
patterns.example: defer func() { if internal.AppShutdown != nil { internal.AppShutdown() } }()

key_file_guides.role: Binary entry point: signal-aware context, Cobra root, PersistentPreRunE DI bootstrap, sub-command registration, and deferred shutdown.
key_file_guides.watch_for: PersistentPreRunE runs before every sub-command — side-effects here affect all commands. AppShutdown must be deferred or resources leak.

key_file_guides.role: Minimal version sub-command; delegates to internal.Version() for build metadata.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Calls internal.Version() which reads ldflags-injected variables — keep in sync with build toolchain.

key_file_guides.role: Wire provider sets and initializeApplication declaration; source of truth for DI graph.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Adding a new service field to Application requires a matching provider in wire.Build. Never edit wire_gen.go directly.

key_file_guides.role: Package-level App, AppShutdown, Config globals consumed by all sub-packages.
key_file_guides.watch_for: These are intentionally global (nolint:gochecknoglobals). Do not introduce a second App construction path.

key_file_guides.role: Pure aggregator — registers advance, advancecharges, collect, subscriptionsync sub-commands with no logic.
key_file_guides.watch_for: No business logic belongs here; keep it as a pure AddCommand aggregator.

key_file_guides.role: Concrete ledger adapter construction that bypasses DI noops when credits.enabled=false.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Must build lockr.Locker and concrete ledger adapters directly — using Wire-provided noop resolvers silently skips writes.

key_file_guides.role: gocron-based polling loops for quickstart/demo environments only.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Not for production workers — production workers use Kafka/Watermill. Nil-check all optional services before scheduling.

anti_patterns: Constructing domain services (billing, charges, ledger) directly inside RunE instead of using internal.App
Using context.Background() or context.TODO() in RunE — always use cmd.Context()
Registering sub-command flags on a parent aggregator Cmd (pollutes sibling flag sets)
Calling tools/migrate DDL or data transforms inline in migrate.go — those belong in tools/migrate/migrations/
Using quickstart cron patterns (gocron polling) in production workers

decisions.decision: PersistentPreRunE wires the entire application once before any sub-command runs
decisions.rationale: Centralises DI bootstrap in main.go so every sub-command automatically gets a fully-wired app without duplicating initialisation logic.

decisions.decision: internal.App package-level globals rather than cobra context injection
decisions.rationale: Simpler sub-package access pattern; avoids cobra context type-assertion boilerplate across many independent sub-packages.

decisions.decision: Ledger backfill bypasses Wire DI to construct concrete adapters
decisions.rationale: When credits.enabled=false, Wire provides noop ledger resolvers; the backfill job must write real rows so it builds concrete adapters directly.

code_examples.scenario: Adding a new administrative sub-command that uses a domain service from internal.App
